note: Every dot is a real reported incident location published by CPD at 4-decimal precision (~11 m) against block-masked addresses ('25XX …') — block-level, never an exact address, never synthesized. The legacy dataset publishes the latitude_x/longitude_x columns REVERSED; orientation is normalized per-row and disclosed. Incidents without usable coordinates are counted in every total but not plotted. Deterministic sample (≤100/month).
orientationNote: 98587 incidents had latitude_x/longitude_x reversed at the source (the whole legacy set) — swapped back deterministically
